ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2010 Continued To Jun-14-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-23-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Coque Dion, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Peter K. Scott, an individual.
No appearance by Roger O. Groh or Big Oceans, LLC.
Defaults were entered against defendant Big Oceans, LLC and Roger O. Groh on Apirl 18, 2007 and June 8, 2009, respectively.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, March 23, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Peter K. Scott, an individual, and against the Defaulted Defendants Roger O. Groh and Big Oceans, LLC, as alter egos of Groh Asset Management, Inc., Montgomery Global Advisors V LLC, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $66,129.45.
Prejudgment Interest - $34,968.87.
Costs - $1,124.72, for a total judgment in the amount of $102,223.04.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
